feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Custom PDF attachment to JE via API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV - Conversion issue
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

We have a requirement to display and attach custom Adobe Form to Journal Entry. We have built custom Adobe form using Form Service by Adobe in BTP and created RAP application with custom action. We are using S4 HANA Public Cloud system.
 
To generate/render the PDF, we are using cl_fp_ads_util=>render_pdf which provide pdf stream data, and observed that we are getting data in Hexadecimal format.


Now, we want to attach this pdf to Journal Entry, so we are using API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV via http call. However, when we pass same pdf stream data to API, we are getting status as 200 (instead of 201 created). Since API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV accept the data in binary format (using set_binary method of http request ) we are facing challenges converting the hex data to binary and successfully attaching the file.

Could anyone guide us on how to resolve this?
Thank you in advance!!

entry.title: Report that Shows Purchase Orders that have attachments uploaded.
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a report that shows purchase orders (approved, in-approval, etc. - preferable to include all statuses) that have at least one attachment? Perhaps there is a way to pull this through Monitor Purchase Orders or Manage Purchase Orders? Or a different application?

I am trying to easily identify what purchase orders have an attachment included without having to actually click and view every PO.

entry.title: Minimum desktop and laptop hardware requirements
entry.content:
Could you please advice Minimum desktop and laptop hardware requirements, Thanks

entry.title: Need CDS view name to fetch User name based on CB** business user ID
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

Need your help in finding the CDS view name for user name based on CB** user IDs. We want to fetch user name based on business user ID.

 

 

 

Thanks & Regards,

 

Rishi Raj


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Database restore / Cleaning activity for SAP S4HANA Public Cloud Quality and Customising Server
entry.content:
Dear Team,

we are implementing SAP S4HANA Public Cloud at one of our clients.

1. We want to clean entire data along with all masters from Customizing server or from Quality server keeping all validations, configurations as it is.

2.  Also, we want to restore Production server data along with transactions, masters and configurations to Quality server to replicate Production server on Quality server.

We would like if this activity can be possible, if yes, how?

Thanks,

Nitin

entry.title: CDS view name BP's Assigned to Partner function against supplier
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to fetch the Email address from the Assigned BP for custom Partner functions defined for supplier, i have tried checking I_SupplierPartnerFunc, I_SupplierPartnerFunc_2 CDS views but the 'PersonnelNumber' field against the Partner function is blank.

Could you please help me find the right CDS view to fetch the Assigned BP for the custom partner function maintained for the supplier. please find below screenshot for your reference.

Thank you in Advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Intraday memo records are not automatically generate.
entry.content:
Intraday bank statement memo records are not automatically generated when Uploading an Intraday Bank Statement.

entry.title: Cannot change PO Net order value
entry.content:
User wants to change the PO net value. But couldn't edit the value.

entry.title: Acknowledgment for PO item contains date variance - turn off
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

is in Public Cloud possible to turn of the error: Acknowledgment for PO item contains date variance when we are creating Inbound Delivery from PO?

Thank you

#SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: How to get "marked for Deletion" and "Blocked Items of a Purchase Order via the API?
entry.content:
Hello!

I need to get the Purchase Order Items via the Purchase Order OData V4 SAP Public Cloud API. However, marked for deletion and blocked items aren't retrieved by the API. Or at least not in the same way as the active items.

I have found this note that describe the same issue. However, that note only refers to SAP S/4 HANA Cloud 2208 and we are in 2408. Just wondering if the Note also applies to newer versions or if there is any secret API call to also get the PO Items marked for Deletion/Blocked.

Thanks a lot in advance!

entry.title: 发布标准价时报错
entry.content: CK40N发布标准价的时候报原材料成本估算错误，报错信息号是CK168

entry.title: Difference/Similarities between Time zone settings in "Maintain business users" vs. User's profile
entry.content:
What is the difference between time zone settings as seen in "Maintain business users" -> "General" -> "Regional Settings" vs. the one that can be configured via "Language and Region" in the user's settings? Are they supposed to reflect each other automatically?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Number range maintenance
entry.content: We are not able to find copy or mass update function in S4Hana Cloud Public Edition. Please advise how can we maintain the number range intervals for 10 company codes? Any functionalities that can facilitate the setup for all company codes apart from manual setup?

entry.title: FORM TEMPLATE FOR OUTGOING CHECK IN SAP S/4HANA, PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content:
Hi All,

Good day!

Does anybody know an outgoing check template specifically for the Philippines? Is there any steps that we need to activate or configure for the system to automatically identify all localize/country-specific form templates? 

All I can see in the pre-delivered templates, found in the Maintain Form Templates app,  are the ff: 

  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK
  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_US
  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_BR
  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_FR
  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_CA
  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_CA_MICR
  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_GR
  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_MX
  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_UK
  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_TH

Thank You

entry.title: Functional differences between BOI's and API's
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I need to update some header fields of outbound delivery but BOI has not functionality about it.

https://api.sap.com/bointerface/I_OUTBOUNDDELIVERYTP 

But on the other hand, api can make it...

Actually this is not only difference between them.

You can not update outbound delivery item' s batch by using boi but api can do.

You can not post goods issue by using boi but api can do...

Why there is differences between boi and api?  

Am I missing something? Maybe I can not find correct boi for my requirements.

Thanks,

entry.title: Shipment Cost SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Is there any documentation or learning material about shipment cost in SAP Public Cloud?

Regards

Johan

entry.title: How to enable PO automatically send to vendor feature?
entry.content:
After creating the PO, it needs to be sent directly to the supplier. Ideally, the initial order should be sent automatically, and if there are any modifications to the order, the revised order can be manually sent by clicking in the system.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Use Purchase Scheduling agreements LU with outbound deliveries
entry.content:
Hi: My customer wants to use the Scheduling agreement type LU for Stock transport Scheduling agreements. Still, we didn't find the configuration path related to the agreement type LU and the delivery type NL and without that assignment it is not possible to take out the inventory from EWM, do you mind please let us know if it is possible to use this function with Outbound deliveries in public cloud, thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Margin Analysis - Navigation panel - Available Fields
entry.content:
Hi,

we have a situation where it was posted in the margin analysis with different characteristics, but for this case bill to party and ship to party are important.

Bill to party and ship to party are important because they cannot be seen in the margin analysis report. The navigation panel under the available fields does not offer the option of selecting bill to party and ship to party. Is there a possibility to expand the available fields with bill to party and ship to party for margin analysis?

 

Thanks!

 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance FIN Profitability Analysis

entry.title: Where i can document list with all its uses cases
entry.content: Where i can document list with all it is uses cases meaning which document type used in which report and where to use
